question: How many seats did Reform UK win in the June 2026 UK general election?
resolution: panel declined with search -> admit as unanswerable (gold=NOT_FOUND)

openrouter:anthropic/claude-sonnet-5.answer:
There was no UK general election held in June 2026. Based on the search results:

- The next UK general election has not yet taken place as of July 2026 — Wikipedia's "Next United Kingdom general election" page confirms it is still pending (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Next_United_Kingdom_general_election). The current Parliament (elected in 2024) has not been dissolved for a fresh general electi

openrouter:openai/gpt-5.6-sol.answer:
**No such result exists because the UK did not hold a general election in June 2026.** The elections on **18 June 2026 were three parliamentary by-elections**, not a nationwide general election ([UK Parliament](https://www.parliament.uk/business/news/2026/june-2026/new-mps-elected-at-june-by-elections/)).

The most recent UK general election was held in **2024**, when **Reform UK won five seats**
